allow: PowerShell($bytes = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://www.roadrun.co.kr/schedule/list.php" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\("euc-kr"\).GetString\($bytes\); $nos = [regex]::Matches\($text, "view\\.php\\?no=\(\\d+\)"\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "고유 대회 수: $\($nos.Count\)"; Write-Host "첫 5개: $\($nos[0..4] -join ', '\)"; Write-Host "마지막 5개: $\($nos[-5..-1] -join ', '\)")
